title: WalStatsOutput
description: NDJSON output of the `wal-stats` subcommand (G119 L5). Read-only snapshot of the workspace's WAL sidecar state used by CI gates and agent health checks.

total_journals.description: Total number of sidecar journals found in the workspace.

by_state.description: Breakdown of journals by terminal state.

started.description: Journals whose last entry is `Started` (potential orphans).

committed.description: Journals whose last entry is `Committed` (safe to clean).

aborted.description: Journals whose last entry is `Aborted` (safe to clean).

malformed.description: Journals that could not be parsed (do not auto-clean).

oldest_journal_age_secs.description: Age of the oldest journal in seconds (0 if no journals found).

total_size_bytes.description: Total bytes occupied by all sidecar files in the workspace.

by_directory.description: Top directories by journal count (up to 10 entries).

path.description: Directory path relative to the workspace root.

count.description: Number of journals in this directory.

auto_heal_recommended.description: True when the workspace has accumulated enough journals to warrant an auto-heal pass (total > 100 OR oldest > 7 days).

estimated_reclaim_bytes.description: Estimated bytes that would be reclaimed by an auto-heal pass (sum of `Committed` + `Aborted` sidecar sizes).
